examples: The grapes are originally native to Croatia but this winery is in eastern Italy and it has a more spicy and peppery flavor.
The spice imparts an hot and peppery flavor to the dish.
Mighty as the plant is nutritionally, I love it most of all for its peppery bite.
Though he mainly uses flowers raw, he also makes floral bouillons, including one made with peppery nasturtiums.
